code-reviewer.description: Thorough code review with security, performance, and best practice checks

security-auditor.description: OWASP Top 10, injection, XSS, secrets, and auth issue scanning

data-analyst.description: Data exploration, statistical analysis, and insight generation

debugger.description: Systematic bug hunting and root cause analysis

content-creator.description: Blog posts, social media content, and marketing copy

decision-helper.description: Structured decision frameworks and trade-off analysis

ux-designer.description: UI/UX design feedback and wireframe suggestions

project-planner.description: Project roadmaps, milestones, and resource planning

meeting-notes.description: Meeting summaries, action items, and follow-ups

technical-writer.description: Documentation, API docs, and technical guides

academic-researcher.description: Literature reviews, paper analysis, and citation management

editor.description: Proofreading, style improvements, and clarity editing

deep-research.description: Multi-source research with synthesis and citations

sprint-planner.description: Sprint planning, task estimation, and backlog grooming

python-expert.description: Python optimization, packaging, and best practices
